hero.title: Track Your Shipment in Real Time
hero.subtitle: Enter your tracking number below to get live updates on the location and status of your shipment.
hero.unavailableMessage: Online tracking is currently unavailable. Please contact our support for your shipment status.

form.label: Tracking Number
form.hint: Your tracking number can be found in your shipping confirmation email.

timeline.title: Shipment Timeline
timeline.orderPlacedDesc: Your shipment order has been received and confirmed.
timeline.inTransitDesc: Package is on its way to the destination hub.
timeline.outForDeliveryDesc: Package is with our courier for final delivery.

realtime.title: Real-Time Updates
realtime.desc: Live GPS tracking with automatic notifications at every milestone.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.desc: Get SMS and email alerts so you're always informed, without checking manually.

history.title: Full History
history.desc: Access the complete journey of every shipment from pickup to final delivery.

cta.subtitle: Ready to ship? Contact our team for a tailored quote.
